name: Barvarian Veal
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Veal, cut into 4 thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat veal dry with paper towels.
2. Season each piece of veal with salt, sugar, white pepper, and mustard.
3. Place a bacon slice on top of each vealed piece.
4. Place an unbroken egg on top of the bacon.
5. Roll up each piece of veal into a jelly-roll shape and secure with string.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the veal rolls on all sides.
7. Add diced onion to the pan; sauté for 3 minutes.
8. Add heated beef bouillon and cover. Simmer gently for 25 minutes.
9. Remove veal from the pan and set aside.
10. Remove strings from veal and keep it warm on a serving platter.
11. Add tomato paste to the pan drippings and stir.
12. Mix flour and red wine until no lumps remain.
13. Combine this mixture with sauce and cook until thickened.
14. Add warmed veal rolls to the sauce and heat through.
15. Before serving, place veal rolls on a platter, pour sauce over them, and serve with puréed potatoes.
